data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding status-driven eligibility checks for assignment pipelines.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'status-driven eligibility checks for assignment pipelines', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for such checks, yet the prior step evidence does not include any checks or data related to eligibility based on status. This lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of status-driven eligibility checks for assignment pipelines.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
